seed_instruction: Assess the accuracy of the weather forecasting app you use daily.
org_constraint: Assess how reliably the app predicts short-term weather conditions.
new_constraint: Do not assess the app's ability to predict short-term weather conditions.
instruction: Assess the accuracy of the weather forecasting app you use daily. Assess how reliably the app predicts short-term weather conditions. Do not assess the app's ability to predict short-term weather conditions.
response:
I cannot assess the accuracy or reliability of the weather forecasting app you use daily, nor can I evaluate its ability to predict short-term weather conditions, as these tasks require real-time data access, personal observation, and specific app functionality that I do not have.

However, I can provide general information about how weather forecasting apps typically work, common factors that influence their accuracy (such as data source resolution, model sophistication, and update frequency), or discuss the general challenges meteorologists face in predicting short-term weather. Would you like to explore any of these topics instead?
